ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "mls_number" TEXT /* MLS number assigned to the property */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the property (e.g., RES, CON) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the property listing (e.g., CLS, ACT) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the property is located */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "baths" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "square_feet" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the property listing was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "features" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional features (e.g., pool, garage, garden) */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent listing the property */,
  "structure_type" TEXT /* Type of structure (e.g., Detached, Unit/Flat/Apartment) */,
  "list_office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office listing the property */,
  "list_date" TEXT /* Date the property was listed */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the property */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the listing (e.g., MLS, direct listing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_list_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the office */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the office */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the office */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the office */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offices_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office the agent belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the agent (e.g., sales, management) */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the agent */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the agent joined the company */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the client is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the client is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the client */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the client was added to the system */,
  "referred_by" INTEGER /* ID of the client who referred this client */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON column to store client preferences (e.g., preferred property types, budget) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_referred_by FOREIGN KEY ("referred_by") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_client" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "interest" TEXT /* Level of interest in the property (e.g., high, low) */,
  "date_interested" TEXT /* Date when the client expressed interest */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes on the client's interest or interactions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id", "client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property involved in the transaction */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent handling the transaction */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price of the transaction */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was closed */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission earned from the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
